reviews.review_text: Didn't use the cabins therefore we can't rate them.  Very clean amenities,  lovely staff,  grounds are a credit to the team, quiet location, pet friendly.
Cleanest and best maintained caravan park I've stayed at. Jeff, Taryn and staff are amazing. Highly recommend.

A great caravan park.  only a few km drive into town. The park is on the King River - very relaxing. The couple managing the park are lovely - super friendly, and doing a good job of maintaining the park.
What a wonderful park. Jason and Maeve are so accommodating.  Amenities are spotless and whats not to love about having the river on your doorstep. King River Tavern right next door!

What a great park!
Spacious and level sites, with slab and green grass.
Very clean amenities with the best showers (rare to find mixer taps!)
Close to Albany but far enough away to enjoy the starry skies.
Staff were great and worked hard to keep the place maintained and it showed. Would highly recommend! Happy Days all around 10/10
Beautiful and well maintained park. I was a solo traveller and felt comfortable and welcomed. The view of the river was great. It was very peaceful and the amenities were great!
Lovely quiet park. No traffic noise. Only 11 mins drive from town and well worth staying here. Clean amenities and helpful staff.

Camped here with my family. It is a beautiful, quiet camp ground on the river. Smaller than your bigger franchised caravan parks which is how we like it. Plenty of trees and birds around. The park is well maintained. Our site had grass surrounding it and backed onto the river. The closest bathroom to us was a toilet/shower combo and was always kept clean. Could not fault this park. Would stay here again.
Beautiful tranquil spot very clean lovely managers lovely people
Stayed 6 days, relaxing, clean facilities, nice sires for our caravan. Well maintained.
Very friendly staff, clean ammenities. Very peaceful would recommend happy days. We will be back
Friendly & helpful, hard working staff they seem they don't stop, very clean & tidy park highly recommend

The caravan park was neat, clean, and easily accessible.
Hot showers, clean amenities,  great bbq in the camp kitchen.  Together with river views,  it was a lovely 3 night stay.
Quiet location but still close enough to Albany for dining out & shopping.

Good campsite, well kept grounds & the facilities were the cleanest i’ve ever seen at a campsite. We were told we could check in by 5:30 then on the day got a call saying we had to be there by 4 which wasn’t ideal as we were driving from Margaret River but all worked out.

Happy Days was like a resort. Sweeping lush lawns by the river. Lots of space between bays and so quiet and peaceful. Great pristine amenities, fully equipped camp kitchen and happy accomodating staff. 2 mins walk to the pub and few mins drive to town.

We have just enjoyed a lovely stay at Happy Days. We loved our riverfront site.  The grounds and facilities were immaculate and consistently maintained. The staff were very helpful and went the extra mile (thanks Jeff!). We definitely recommend Happy Days Caravan Park.

Just want to reply to the last three reviews, we offered you both alternative sites not one but two to choose from. We also gave you both full refunds in cash, which was 330$ and 220$ minus one nights stay as you both left late in the afternoon when we were closing up. You both took our site cards with you. Which belong to Happy Days. And your husband’s skidded out the gate , In our whole 13 years of being here we have never had anyone not be happy for a site on the River front, they are our most requested sites, and we have 5 families on those sites at the moment with toddlers and small children who are absolutely enjoying them. And have requested to stay on River front sites next year. We don’t normally reply to reviews but we wanted to share our side of the story.

Absolutely appalling management and customer service,  couldn’t care less if you, or your children, lived or died. Reneged on the agreed full refund after we arrived and they couldn’t fulfill the booking made over 6 months in advance and provide a safe site for our young family. Recommend staying at King River Palms on the other side instead, equally beautiful sites and facilities but the owners actually care for their visitors and are warm, welcoming and accommodating.

Terrible customer service. Hot tip, even if they guarantee you something in writing they will  point blank deny it (despite evidence to the contrary). Completely bonkers.
There are plenty of other customer oriented parks around with friendly crew running them - go to them, we did.

Good facilities though…
Facilities are good but staff are horrible
Very peaceful, big sites, friendly caretakers and amenities are nice and clean.
Great location. Great staff. Well presented grounds.
Verry clean  .The Starf cean the loos and showers 4 times a day . Lovley starf .we will be back .

Hands down the best caravan park we’ve stayed at in WA (and we’ve been all over!). Lovely folk, clean amenities, green grass, and frequent, daily maintenance. We stayed at one of the sites next to the river and it was gorgeous. Highly highly highly recommend this place!

Would recommend staying here to anyone in a heart beat, went above and beyond for my partner and I who’s car unfortunately didn’t make it through our holiday and before that when our accommodation fell through during probably one of the busiest seasons of the year. When it comes to staff and amenities you couldn’t ask for better.
Very friendly staff, so green and immaculately kept! Amenities super clean!

Very beautiful site. Always mowing and maintaining the grass. Very clean toilets and showers. The owner was extremely accommodating for us whilst we were buying a house. Thanks Geoff, really appreciate your help 🙏
Hapoy days, happt stays. This van park is immaculatey presented, manicured lawns and pretty gardens. It was very peaceful and amenities super clean.

The facilities are exceptionally clean and the park is very well maintained. The staff are friendly and helpful.  The location by the river is tranquil and  only a short drive from the city of Albany.  It's not ideal for kids but if you are looking for peace and quiet that could be a bonus. We will be back
15 minutes to Albany. Quite feels like a country CP. Staff  very helpful. Ablutios good and clean.
I have stayed in hotels that were much less clean than this place. Spotless and such a great spot on the side of the river. Staff were lovely and could not be happier for a very good price.

Fabulous… lovely clean amenities , spacious sites, beautiful caravan park … would definitely stay again… thank you for your service. A pity other Caravan Parks in WA wouldn’t take note … some are very expensive with crappie dirty amenities …. We came from the East to visit WA … Western Australia not the Wild West !!
The park was 10 out of 10. Friendly staff and clean amenities.  Park well kept, a credit to all. Slightly out of town, quiet location which was a definate plus. Would definitely stay here again.

Stayed on a powered site on the river the sites are level and are prestine ,the gardens are lush and are manicured,the toilet block is also immaculate with 4 hooks in the shower cubicles which is unheard of these days,and the cleanest white ceiling I have ever seen ,hats of to the owners job well done
Fantastic park. Groomed to perfection 👌.  Excellent service. Good amenities. Thanks for a wonderful stay.
Caravan site,beautifully maintained park.
Friendly and helpful staff, clean amenities with good showers. Well provisioned camp kitchen. Beautiful and relaxed setting.
Hadn't been for almost 30 years.The park is beautiful,clean and manicured to an inch. The staff amazingly friendly. The toilets were always clean. Definitely be back alot sooner.

Rang and booked a site, Geoff said he had a powered site for us to check in the next day. Upon arrival we were informed that they had given the site to a person who just drove up for a site.
Very unimpressed!
Would not look at this park again.
Great caravan park in a great location.  This is the one we stay at when we visit Albany

A wonderful caravan park.Lovely welcome by staff, very helpful.The park is beautifully maintained, lovely lawns right next to the river. Amenities are spotless. Would recommend a stay here. We definitely will be back.

Had a really unpleasant experience when calling this caravan park. Spoke to a lady named Karen (really lived up to the name). I was spoken to rudely and very unprofessional for a caravan park.
Wouldn’t recommend visiting this place, there are plenty more caravan parks around Albany with better customer service!
We had a powered camp site
A bit out of town but on a lovely river.
Such a nice park and the young couple running it while the boss is away are just lovely.
One of the best parks I've stayed in. Everything was clean and tidy, large grassy sites, plenty of bathrooms and showers. Nice on the river just out of town.
A lovely caravan park just 10 mins out of Albany .Grounds immaculate .Toilets and showers very clean .Dog friendly .Great river for kayaking .Easy entry .Lovely management 😊
Fantastic  place  highly  recommended  stayed extra days because  it was so relaxing, close to everything,  and well maintained

What a great caravan park.   So friendly and helpful staff
Amenities so clean beautiful location would recommend to anyone.
Lovely spot by the river. Nice grassy park 10 mins from town.

OK, Happy Days Caravan Park...what can I say.  GREAT Location, GREAT Staff and GREAT Value for money.  The day we arrived we were welcomed with a smile 😁 , which, was what we had for the entirety of our long stay holiday.  BIG mention to the EVER friendly, EVER cheerful, EVER busy fella by the name of Glen...what a true Gentleman and Happy go Lucky style of attitude, who was ALWAYS flat-out busy, but, ALWAYS had time for the Campers...whether it be a helping hand or, a friendly smile, or a wave 👋 or a chat if he was not too busy 😄💯.  And of course his Awesome Wife Lisa who was a GREAT help to us on our stay and a SUPER friendly person to boot...what a couple 💯🙏😎.  Of course Adrian, another hardworking gentleman who has a Heart of Gold 🥇, Geoff, the Boss-man, great guy and friendly chap, not so chatty as he was constantly mowing the grass 😄🤣😉 (sorry Geoff)...and anyone else we missed.  Awesome Campsite which you would find hard to beat...10 / 10.  THANKS ALL...Lee & Marianne 🙂😎

Do not believe Gunjan Bajaj’s review! I was there when they were there and the young children were often running around peoples camp sites and cars and a lot of the time using high pitched screams! The families bought no cooking stuff themselves and took over the camp kitchen and tables inside every meal and there was about 4-5 families and there was no room for anyone else because they took over the stove , bbq and sink ! Yes it’s a quiet park , it’s tranquil and relaxing and people don’t want to hear children constantly screaming. Yes I heard them the 3 nights they were there and they had no consideration for anyone else and being the long weekend the park was at capacity. When more than 1 patron makes a complaint about noise managers have to act whether it’s in time limits or not and if managers agreed that they were making too much noise then they have the right to approach and request noise levels be reduced…. the morning time this person listed as 5am is not correct because people are still sleeping at 5am. I heard the children again screaming and yelling and running around at 5:30. We found this place to be one of the best places we’ve stayed at in our 14 month to date travelling around the country and to put a review like this person did is so not called for!  Go stay there and see how fantastic it is yourself. We cannot and will not fault it . Highly recommended !

We couldn't be more estatic about staying at this van park....we stayed in a powered site by the glorious King River ....clean, freshly mowed beautiful, beautiful grassy site.... staff were AMAZING, up for a chat, great information for exploring Albany & so friendly(Bobby the jack russell, I just wanted to smuggle in my truck when we left, so cuddly)....amenities were pristine...grounds are pristine... everywhere was awesome....  I will give you 10 stars🌟 .... next lap around, we will be coming back to The Gorgeous Albany Happy Days Caravan Park.  Thank you for a wonderful 2 days stay ❤️ 😘 💙
Everything was great. We had an unpowered site for 35/night. Toilets/Showers very nice!

The place is beautiful, amenities are amazing, spotless toilets and showers!

What turned us down was the admin/management. Quiet time being 10 pm To 5 am, we were still told off for laughing, giggling and talking around 9:10 pm. The owner of the place said: "I don't care what time it is, it's always a quiet time in the caravan park". Very contradictory to their rules of caravan park which are displayed at the front desk: talk and laugh and enjoy time with your loved ones!! We were also charged extra not once but twice. If we hadn't checked our receipts and talked to our friends, wouldn't have realised that we're were being charged extra! The caravan park probably is for elderly cohort and not for big groups and or families with kids who probably will make noise because of the large no. of folks!!

Had the pleasure of staying with our caravan for 6 nights 🌙,  the property is the best maintained park we have been in during our 4 and a half years on the road , special mention to Glen , extremely helpful and polite , Kiwi always with a smile , and , last but not least Jeff , the owner , the most pedantic operator I have had the pleasure of associating with . The reception upon arrival was a breeze thanks to the front staff , most important with first impressions.
Highly recommended.
Ps, give Glen a payrise, 😆 🤣

What a fabulous find. We stayed in our van and had a spot overlooking the bend in the river. The park is so well maintained with green grass areas, immaculate edges & mowing, clean abolution facilities and camp kitchen. The sites are well positioned and there is a turn around area to the left of the office with a visitor car park to the right.
The managers were super friendly and this park is a real credit to them.
Very good value at $45 per night.

We stayed for a week but quiet easily could have stayed a month,we have been travelling for 10.5 months and this is by far our favourite park.Every aspect of our stay was amazing,from the staff to the views.Very Highly recommend.Hoping to return one day.

Happy Days is just that. A happy place to stay. We camped in a group of 5. Our position along the high river banks afforded us relaxing views. The park is very well cared for. Facilities and ablutions were in great condition and clean. The park kitchen although small afforded us excellent facilities and even a share fridge was available! Got lots of puppy pats from people staying with their dogs (and a cat!). There was nothing we didn’t like about staying here. A 10 minute drive from beaches and Albany town, shops, a pub up the road. The  staff were kind and caring, fixing a tent wanting to blow away, keeping grounds immaculate. We rate this caravan park highly and are going back next year, this time with a fishing rod 🎣 😎⛺️ 🐕
Office closed on arrival. No way to book in.

We loved this park.  Family of 5 in a camper trailer with small tents.  From our booking, to follow up phone calls to site requests to check in,  we were always treated with kindness and a warm welcome.  Staff were friendly and helpful.

We had plenty of space and appreciated the beautifully kept grounds, gardens and amenities.  Bathrooms and toilets were always clean, bins always emptied and grounds tidy.

Sites were easily marked, we were met at the gate and shown to our site.  Kids were welcome and could ride bikes around and had a great time fishing in the river.

Thanks for a peaceful and enjoyable camp stays.  One of the best.

We stayed at this park early January.  Park was immaculate! The owners and staff take great pride in keeping the lawns manicured and facilities clean.  They were all happy and up for a chat which is nice.

Really friendly staff, spotlessly clean amenities and grounds. The park is in a quiet location, walking distance to a small tavern and a lovely creek flows right next to it with good fishing. It’s very easy to get to the town center or any of the major highways in and out of the area. Highly recommend this park.

Absolutely stunning park, that is the best kept I've even been. This park is an absolute credit to the owners, who are so obliging.  Nothing is too hard and the bays are so large, so you are not on top of each other. Can't recommend highly enough.
Marcelc7_photo

Nous avons passé un très agréable séjour dans ce camping propre et bien entretenu.
Un grand merci à Jeff et à tout le staff pour leur gentillesse !

Great little hideaway.  Plenty of room. Beautifully maintained. Clean.
Glen greeted us, helped us to our spot. Checked on us while keeping our privacy. Friendly guy, great laughs and chat. Cheap even  during holiday season

Absolutely loved our stay at Happy Days wish we could have stayed longer. will definitely be back such a beautiful place. Green grass, flowers, facilities spotless, management friendly. We had a spot right in front of the river watching everyone on their canoes. Just perfect 🥰

Absolutely immaculately kept park a credit to tge owners.
Gardens manicured, ablutions cleaned several times throughout the day.
Reasonable rates, better than some of the others not so nice in Albany.
Will definitely return 💯 recommend
Great place 😃

We had the pleasure of staying at this fantastic park on a river adjacent unpowered site for 3 nights. This place stands out for the staff’s unparalleled attention to detail in terms of maintenance, cleaning, friendliness & clearly aiming to create a wonderful holiday experience for their visitors.
The grass is green; lawns are mowed, bathrooms are clean; laundry is spotless; and kitchen / bbq facilities well maintained & a pleasure to use.
Kudos to the whole team for creating an excellent visitor experience. In addition we loved watching the kangaroos across the creek at sunset & the birdlife on the creek is also a treat.

What a beautiful caravan park. Only approx 8km out of Albany right on the river. Big sites, nice green grass, clean amenities and very helpful and friendly staff.  A nice environment to kick back and just enjoy the moment. They even hire canoes if you want to go for a paddle. |Thank you

I just stayed at the happy days park on a tent site , beautiful park the best i stayed in lush green grass and neat paths to drive on and clean and tidy bathrooms , I will be staying here next time I'm in Albany 👍
Beautiful camping grounds, quiet and extremely well maintained. Great location. Glen on the ground is a real gentleman who is happy to answer your questions and have a chat 👍
Excellent family run campsite with very well kept facilities. Very cute location very close to all beaches in Albany. One of the best we stayed in on our North West to South West trip.

We had a wonderful stay at Happy Days Caravan park. We booked last minute (same day) & got a beautiful large site next to the river. Supposed to stay for 2 but we extended our stay 3 more nights! The groundsman is a very dedicated gentleman who tends to the gardens/grassed area everyday (even Sunday). Ablutions are cleaned everyday. Definitely recommended!

Have been here many times with our van and our daughter has stayed in a cabin once. Manager Geoff and staff are always obliging. Facilities immaculate.  Peacefully situated on the King River. Thanks Geoff.

We have stayed in many of Western Australia’s caravan parks and campsites but for us this is the best. Green lawns, well kept gardens and facilities and very friendly and helpful staff. The King River flows gently past and it’s so peaceful and quiet. Highly recommend Happy Days CP near Albany.
Great caravan park. Plenty of space, set out perfectly, beautiful grass areas, very clean ablutions block. Best park we gave stayed at.

Do yourself a favour and stay here. The managers were very helpful. The park is friendly, peaceful and the facilities are extremely clean. The gardens are beautiful and the very green grass is manicured like a golf course.
What a pleasure to see such pride taken by the managers.
Thank you 🙏
I love this place it’s got really clean amenities and friendly staff
Well equipped, clean and quiet.
We were very happy with the service we received. We will be back.
Very nice. Off the highway and on the river.

Most certainly a fantastic little park. A little way out of town so very quiet. On the banks of the King River. Wonderfully maintained and Taryn and Geoff could not be more helpful and obliging. Fire pits available and a wood fire going in the Camp Kitchen every night we were here. Kayak hire available.
Clean modern amenities.

One of the best caravan parks we have ever stayed in . Fantastic staff, atmosphere is amazing. Grounds & Amenities are spotless .
Would highly recommend this spot.
Great place to go to with a caravan amenities were very clean presentation of the park was excellent.
Beat caravan park we have ever stayed at, amazing layout and facilities great staff! Thankyou
Great park for a non powered site next to the river. Friendly owners/staff. They even light the combustion heater at night in the camp kitchen. Enjoyed the quiet.
Keep coming back. Very clean and well kept.
Wonderful place to stay on thè river, you can fish, go canoeing. Great for kids.
Happy days caravan Park Albany great van Park friendly and helpful staff well maintained and very relaxing Park will be back next year.
Great caravan Park we absolutely enjoy our stay clean amenities great staff highly recommend this park.
We are in a motor home! Lovely site on the River! Green grass! Well cared for park! Managers doing an amazing job! We like it so much we are bringing friends back during the Easter break.

After reading similar reviews for this Not So Happy Days Caravan  Hell! I thought I would do the right thing and speak my mind, which I should have done last May.

I visited this caravan park about a year ago and never got around to writing a review until now. As I prepare to return to Albany this week, I am reminded of the unpleasant experience I had with a particularly unfriendly manager/owner during my previous stay.

Upon arrival, I had booked a cabin for three days and paid in advance. However, on our first night, we encountered several issues. We discovered bits and pieces in our tea, which we later realized had come from the kettle. Additionally, there was no hot water in the building, and the microwave was not working properly.

We approached the front reception, where the staff member was very kind and understanding. She assured us that someone would address the issues immediately. However, shortly after, we were startled by loud banging on the door. To our dismay, the manager/owner who had been abusive towards us appeared, expressing his disdain for tourists and making derogatory remarks.

Despite our attempts to calmly discuss the situation, he became increasingly hostile and stating that this is why he hates tourists and that we will be the last to get a cabin, the only people he will supply the cabin to is to the local workers. This he finished off with “If you don’t like it just pack up and get out!”

Feeling unwelcome and disrespected, we decided to cut our stay short and departed immediately.

The lady at the front desk returned the balance of our money and sympathized with us, informing us that the owner/manager, who had behaved so rudely, was known for his unpleasant demeanour. She mentioned that she and her husband, who were both lovely, were planning to leave in the near future.

While the location of the caravan park is undeniably beautiful, my experience was marred by the unprofessional behaviour of one individual. It's unfortunate that such negativity detracts from what could otherwise be a pleasant stay.
Beautiful park. So neat and tidy. Staff were friendly. And right on the river. What more could you want. Best park in Australia 🌏.

I asked for a camp site on the grass by the river and it was absolutely perfect 🏕
Green green grass and gardens along the river bed, toilets were always clean and smelling fresh, cute little Campers Kitchen, perfect little spots for a couple of nights in Albany
Beautifully maintained caravan park in a picturesque spot on the river, very friendly staff. Dog friendly and they have a lovely dog sitter Maddie.Highly recommend this caravan park

My sister stayed here and I visited, so I booked in when returning to Albany.  Positioned my campervan so my head would lay higher than my feet on the very low gradient slope.  Had some trouble getting power to work microwave and air-conditioning but a neighbour assisted and all is well.  Great shower and toilet block.  Camp kitchen stocked with utensils and items to cook (breakfast).
Have stayed here b4. Will stay again in time.

We have been coming down from Mandurah for some years now with Shadow (pooch)
Always friendly warm welcome staff and will always make our stay perfect no matter the weather
Always super clean park/ablutions/camp kitchen and the rest 👌

Powered site nestled among the trees waking up to birds whistling in the morning

We will come again

Cheers
Jim and Barb
Mandurah
A beautiful quiet place to stay and relax...
Lovely location so peaceful and relaxing

Loved the park, so quiet and relaxing by the river, lovely staff. Very helpful and friendly. Really enjoyed our stay. Would go back. The only problem we had was with dryer taking our money 10 dollars and still not dry,but obviously it was faulty
Great location just out of Albany. Beautiful scenery on the river. Great tidy camp kitchen and ablution facilities.

greT little campsite very friendly
right on the river brilliant place for kyayk
Beautiful spot on the river.  Very clean.  Lovely hosts.

Love this place.  Been there many times.  Only use a tent site these days.  Clean, quiet, great staff.  Very relaxing.  Will be back again. Recommend it to anyone who wants to know of a great place to stay in Albany
Very clean and well run caravan park during next to King River and the Tavern. Gas filling, great showers and tv aerial on powered site.
Great place to stay ...clean amenities.. great sites.....will stay again
Jeff and Taryn are amazing hosts. Lovely grass manicured sites, spotless amenities.

Fabulous location away from the wind and 10km from town. Lovely parkland garden , well maintained lawn down to the river. You can enjoy a casual paddle on the hire canoes and kayak along the extensive King River.
Thanks to the friendly staff of Happy Days Caravan Park

One of the best camp sites we’ve stayed at. Beautifully kept park with amazing river views, facilities were immaculate. We took kayaks and paddle boards which we launched right outside our site. Only 10 minutes out of Albany, definitely the perfect place to stay. Will definitely be back.
Lovely peaceful campsite by the river with brilliant facilities and LOVELY staff!

Great and very clean park with well maintained lawn areas right on the river.
They don't come much better than this.

I can't think of one reason not to give five stars. The park is immaculately presented and kept scrupulously clean. Well set out, located on rivers edge, friendly staff, great facilities and well managed so that you feel comfortable and relaxed. I'm not sure if I could ask for much more. Happys Days and happy memories!!

Fantastic caravan park. Very well manicured lawns and gardens. Jeff and staff are very helpful and nice. They offer to help park your van if you need help. We took our washing machine out of our van while we were here and Jeff offered to help. I highly recommend this caravan. You won't be disappointed

Great place to stop for exploring Albany and surrounding area. The sites are large and have concrete areas. The caravan park is on the banks of the King River so great for kayaking. The amenities were clean and had plenty of hot water and the staff were helpful and friendly.
Love this place and will be back, never disappoints and the staff here fantastic , the amenities always clean...
What an amazing place,  so much pride in the care of this park,  definitely be back.

We booked a chalet for 7 people as we had a family do 3 months before, the day before we were told that we had been upgraded to another chalet that only slept 5!
We explained that we needed the 7 birth as we had 7 people booked, they apologised and offered us a refund which was totally useless as we needed accommodation, 2 of our guests had to find alternative accommodation in another caravan park.
No offer of a discount at all for the stuff up, still had to pay full sack.
Really disappointed with the service and lack of care from management
Had a horrible time the owner was rude
Beautiful place for a good holiday in peace

Very neat and tidy, quiet and was able to extend our visit. Ablutions very clean and great hot showers. Site 1 & 2 only suitable for small van or camper trailers all the others looked OK. Grass areas with hard stand gravel for vans and cement awning or parking vehicles.

Excellent service from the moment we arrived and set up our caravan.
The grounds were very clean and well maintained
